evals.name: pre-development-risk-scan
evals.prompt: 帮我分析一下实现支付功能的风险
evals.expected_output: Performs risk assessment across 5 dimensions (history, dependencies, architecture, scope, security). Outputs risk level and mitigation suggestions.

assertions.text: Read-only operation, no files modified for simple check

evals.name: risk-status-overview
evals.expected_output: Shows current risk status across all active CRs, highlights top risks, trend indicators.

assertions.text: Shows risk status for active CRs
Includes trend indicators if history available

evals.name: security-focused-check
evals.prompt: 安全检查一下用户认证模块
evals.expected_output: Focuses on security dimension: authentication patterns, token handling, injection risks.

evals.name: architecture-risk
evals.prompt: 分析一下微服务拆分的风险
evals.expected_output: Analyzes architectural risk: service boundaries, data consistency, deployment complexity.

evals.name: risk-with-cr-context
evals.prompt: CR-003 开始做之前先看看风险
evals.expected_output: Loads CR-003 context, performs risk pre-scan integrated with CR metadata.

assertions.text: Risk assessment specific to CR scope
Risk findings can feed into CR risk section

evals.name: trend-analysis
evals.prompt: 最近的风险趋势怎么样
evals.expected_output: Analyzes risk trends across recent iterations, identifies patterns.
